utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now let's check if each one is included and fully specified in the final package. (1) destination: present and clearly stated as 'Lisbon, Portugal' → fully specified. (2) travel_dates: present and fully specified as '2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09' → fully specified. (3) transportation: includes detailed flight info (airline, airports, class, baggage, cancellation, price) → fully specified. (4) accommodation: includes name, type, location, rating, amenities, price, currency → fully specified. (5) activities: includes type, duration, price inclusion, guide inclusion → fully specified. (6) additional_services: includes breakfast, wifi, parking → fully specified. (7) total_budget: includes total cost, currency, budget limit, and remaining → fully specified. All 7 items are present and sufficiently detailed.
